title: Global Supply Shock: China’s Critical Metal Export Revenue Surges 44% Amid Looming Deadlines
summary: As G7 leaders meet to confront Western over-reliance on Beijing’s supply chains, a dramatic surge in rare earth values and a massive shift in global metals has put tech manufacturers on high alert.
content: A high-stakes economic standoff is intensifying across global supply chains. Fresh trade data reveals that while China's export volumes of critical rare earth elements grew by a modest 2.2% early this year, the financial value of those shipments skyrocketed by a staggering 44.9%.

title: Historic Triumph: Dramatic Injury-Time Goal Seals Epic European Football Championship Title
summary: In an unforgettable final that will be talked about for generations, an unexpected 94th-minute volley turned the stadium into pure bedlam.
